top_findings.summary: The skill description states that research entries (containing detailed development insights, decisions, and potentially sensitive project information) are sent to a third-party server (thehouseofdeals.com) for embedding generation when a POPKIT_API_KEY is available. This data transmission occurs without clear user consent beyond setting an API key, and there is no disclosure about how the data is stored, used, or protected by the external service. While the skill functions locally without the API key, the cloud component sends potentially sensitive research data to an unrelated domain without explicit privacy safeguards or transparency.
